\section{Summary}
\small{ Recent B.E. Electronics and Communication Engineering graduate with hands on experience in emulation, UART protocol development, and HW/SW co verification gained through internships at Synopsys, Nvidia, and Jabil. Skilled in creating UART transactors for Zebu emulators using C++, enhancing protocol functionality, and building HW/SW testbench agents. Strong foundation in Verilog/SystemVerilog, C/C++, Perl, Python, and static timing analysis, seeking to contribute as an Emulation Engineer. }
